content: agent2: implementing key_transform parameter for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby function). Will only touch that function's area.

agent2: heads up - I've already edited sync_do_groupby and do_groupby in src/jinja2/filters.py to add a key_transform param (added as the last param, after default). Added logic after the list comprehension: 'if key_transform is not None: out = [_GroupTuple(key_transform(key), values) for key, values in out]'. Please add your reverse param in the same two function signatures (after key_transform, or wherever) but re-read the file first since I've already changed it, to avoid clobbering. I'm about to write patch.txt now.

agent2: my key_transform patch is done and tests pass on my end — no reverse param visible in my copy of filters.py, so we're likely in isolated environments and don't need further coordination. Good luck!
